subject: [PATCH v4 19/21] swap: simplify swapoff using virtual swap

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the potential impact of this change on other parts of the kernel, specifically the shmem code. Asked for more information and context.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch simplifies the swapoff process by utilizing virtual swap slots stored at page table entries, eliminating the need for a page table walk and reducing kernel CPU time.
